purpose: Validate src/model.py on contract-shaped mock features before real de-novo matrices land.
conclusions: Latent-state recovery is faithful (corr 0.96) and CV is leakage-free (null AUROC~0.5).
Report effect size (var fraction vs null) alongside perm p: null control perm_p=0.02 with negligible effect (0.063 vs 0.058) shows p alone can flag trivial structure.
Code runs unchanged on real de-novo matrices from src/features.py.
